---
title: "About Me"
---

## Background

Passionate developer with a keen interest in building scalable, user-centric applications. I combine technical expertise with creative problem-solving to deliver impactful solutions.

## Skills & Expertise

### Development
- **Frontend**: HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, TypeScript, React, Vue.js
- **Backend**: Python, Node.js, JavaScript, SQL
- **Tools**: Git, Docker, AWS, VS Code

### Data & Analytics
- **Languages**: Python, SQL, R
- **Libraries**: Pandas, NumPy, Matplotlib, Plotly, Scikit-learn
- **Databases**: PostgreSQL, MongoDB, MySQL

### Soft Skills
- Problem-solving and critical thinking
- Team collaboration and communication
- Project management and organization
- Mentoring and knowledge sharing

## Experience Highlights

### Senior Developer | Tech Company (2023 - Present)
- Led development of high-traffic web applications
- Mentored junior developers
- Improved application performance by 40%

### Full Stack Developer | Startup (2021 - 2023)
- Built end-to-end features using React and Python
- Designed and optimized database schemas
- Implemented CI/CD pipelines

### Junior Developer | Agency (2020 - 2021)
- Developed responsive web applications
- Collaborated with design teams
- Fixed critical bugs and improved code quality

## Education

**B.S. in Computer Science**  
University Name, Class of 2020

## Interests

Beyond code, I enjoy:
- Contributing to open-source projects
- Writing technical articles
- Data visualization and storytelling
- Exploring new technologies and frameworks
- Coffee ☕ and keyboard customization ⌨️

---

**Let's connect!** Feel free to reach out via email or social media.
